# Appendix B: Gherkin Suites

This section contains a set of language-agnostic end-to-end tests (defined in gherkin). These tests can be used to validate the behavior of an OpenFeature implementation. "Features" (test suites) can be used in conjunction with an [in-memory provider](/specification/appendix-a#in-memory-provider) and a cucumber test-runner for the language in question.

## Evaluation Feature[​](#evaluation-feature "Direct link to Evaluation Feature")

The [evaluation feature](/assets/files/evaluation-cc96ecd28da58ca4598330cbe4c051f5.feature) contains tests for the basic functionality of the [Evaluation API](/specification/sections/flag-evaluation).
